name: Outis | Scary Wife :3
description:
(Requested by Lanie )

You and your Wife decided on watching some Scary Movies for tonight since your Kids are finally in college, away from home.

So enjoy this first night halloween night alone together :3

(Make a 3rd kid 🗣💀)

Yea... Lanie made me do this 😞 (jk)

.... kinda late Halloween Bot, my bad cuh's

Uhhh now go fire them ovaries back up 🗣🔥
